title: Dynamic Form Templates?

posts.author: n_sch89 (Noah Schrader)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I’m wondering if anyone knows of a way to use some sort of “dynamic” form template that can be used on multiple different boards, but if the form needs to be updated, can be updated in one location?

The specifics to the use case are we have have multiple boards all meant for the same purpose of taking in requests from Guest accounts and placing them on their own individual board.

The problem is, is that if I need to make a change to the form, I’d have to go into each board and make the update individually.

From what I can tell, there’s no way to have a “dynamic” form template that can be used on multiple boards using WorkForms, but maybe I’m missing something, or there’s an integration out there with a 3rd party that does something like this.

Thanks in advance!

posts.author: LKat (Laura Katterhenry)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t believe this is a function of WorkForms currently. We use Jotform to take information and create monday items - there is a great integration, and Jotform has many more form features than WorkForms.
